name: ng-breadcrumb
title: Breadcrumb (Angular)
description: Hierarchical trail - composable Breadcrumb, BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbEllipsis. Use to show the current location within a nested structure. Mirrors React Breadcrumb from @gremorie/rx-navigation.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-breadcrumb.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
